CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2025 Continued To Oct-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

The court grants the unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment. The court finds that the warning required by the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5 to 25249.14); that the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable. Accordingly the motion is granted.

Proposed order and Judgment are submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
